Headline: #75 74th/75th Temporary Reroute near 75th/Lakefront
ShortDescription: 75 74th/75th  buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 75th/Lakefront, due to a street blockage near 75th/Lakefront.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#75 74th/75th  buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 75th/Lakefront, due to a street blockage near 75th/Lakefront.

Eastbound buses will operate via 75th, Coles and line cut.

Westbound buses will operate via Coles, 76th, South Shore, 75th and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #87 87th Temporary Reroute at 87th/Yates
ShortDescription: 87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to fire department activity near 87th/Yates

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 87th, Yates, 83rd, Exchange, Commercial, and 87th over normal route, due to fire department activity near 87th/Yates.

Allow extra travel time.
